title: get_overall_service_health_status
description: Verify that GET /api/v1/health returns a 200 status with overall service health and dependency information without requiring authentication.

title: exchange_oauth_authorization_code_for_access_token
description: Test POST /api/v1/auth/oauth/token with a valid authorization code to ensure it returns a 200 status and a valid access token.

title: basic_authentication_login_with_valid_credentials
description: Test POST /api/v1/auth/basic/login with valid email and password to receive a 200 response containing a JWT token and user object.

title: create_memory_with_valid_data
description: Verify POST /api/v1/memories with valid bearer token and required fields (title, content, memory_type) returns 201 with the created memory object.

title: get_intelligence_job_status_by_id
description: Test GET /api/v1/intelligence/jobs/:id with a valid job id and bearer token returns 200 with job status and progress details.

title: get_subject_profile_by_subject_id
description: Verify GET /api/v1/profiles/:subject_id with bearer token returns 200 with the current subject profile data.

title: create_api_key_with_valid_project_context
description: Test POST /api/v1/api-keys with bearer token and valid project association returns 201 with the new API key details.

title: issue_proxy_token_for_mcp_session_key
description: Verify POST /api/v1/mcp/api-keys/sessions/:sessionId/keys/:keyName/proxy-token with bearer token returns 200 with a session-scoped proxy token.

title: get_prometheus_metrics_with_authorization
description: Test GET /api/v1/metrics with valid bearer token returns 200 with Prometheus-formatted metrics text.

title: list_registered_services_without_authentication
description: Verify GET /api/v1/services returns 200 with a list of registered services without requiring authentication.
